items.why: Mobile mode detected pending /api/gm-decision prompts but still rendered a single advance-week card, forcing the actual choice through the desktop modal path instead of the mobile-first decision loop.

rejected.reason: /api/gm-decision and POST /api/advance-week gmDecisionChoice already exist; building another decision engine would create drift instead of improving the source-of-truth path.
Still blocked on real received-message proof for football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwarding/copying and current live-origin/routing evidence; no fabricated launch evidence used.

gameLoopReview.finding: The mobile loop now lets a phone user see and commit the pending General Manager choice in place, tightening the core loop from pressure -> choice -> consequence.
